rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Stay The Proceedings In Case No. Cgc-14-539808 Until The Decision On Appeal Of Case No. Cud-640755
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 19, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANTS RALAN WONG and PATTY HERNANDEZ' Motion to Stay Proceedings in Case cud-14-539808 until the Decision on Appeal of Case CUD-12-640755: GRANTED. Each cause of action in this complaint is based on allegation of disability (see paragraph 6 incorporated into each cause of action; paragraphs 13, 31, 37, 44, 52, 63). This issue is presently on appeal. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANEESH GUPTA VS. BESS DAUBENMIRE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Aneesh Gupta For Leave To Amend Complaint To Add Lawrence Choy As A Named Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 19, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFF ANEESH GUPTA'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint To Add Lawrence Choy As A Named Defendant: GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion for Leave to amend is GRANTED. Amended Complaint shall be filed forthwith. Motion to shorten time to respond is DENIED. CCP 1005 is not applicable. No other authority cited. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHNNY JOHNS ET AL VS. JONES MEMORIAL HOMES, INC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 19, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANTS GERALD JONES, EMMETT COBB, ROZELLE LEE, JAMES MCCRAY, JONES MEMORIAL HOMES, JONES SENIOR HOMES, and DEREK TOLIVER'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings: Continued to July 17, 2015 at 9:30 AM in Department 501. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and C and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers and the operative complaint; opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies shall be delivered to Department 501 no later than June 26, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of a courtesy copy of reply. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PETR TITTELBACH VS. THOMAS A BROCATO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 19, 2015, line 7. CROSS DEFENDANT PETR TITTELBACH'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT: Sustained. Demurrer to the first cause of action for declaratory relief is sustained with leave to amend in good faith for cross-complainant to allege an actual controversy. If defendant is seeking the determination of his rights as to multiple issues/rights/obligations, each must be alleged in a separate cause of action. Demurrer to the second cause of action for indemnity is sustained without leave to amend. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. NATHANIEL STAHL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Unlawful Detainer Summons By Defendant Nathaniel Stahl
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 19, 2015, line 10. DEFENDANT NATHANIEL STAHL's Motion To Quash Service Of Unlawful Detainer Summons: DENIED. Allegations regarding service of notice are sufficient per CCP 1162(a)(3). Verification is proper. (501/REQ)
